entities.grandmother: a grandmother wearing a green apron

scenes.title: The Baking
scenes.background_prompt: A warm cozy kitchen with a wooden table, shelves with jars, a window with afternoon light, tiled floor. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A warm cozy kitchen. A boy with curly hair and a grandmother in a green apron stand by a wooden table placing fresh cookies in a red box. A small brown dog watches from under the table. Afternoon light through the window. Shelves with jars in the background.

P: they might give the cookies to a friend
A: placing a cookie in the box
CO: the kitchen smells like fresh bread

scenes.scene_description: A warm and inviting kitchen scene shows a young boy and his grandmother baking together. The boy has dark, curly hair and a joyful expression; he wears a green knitted sweater over a blue collared shirt. He is standing at a large wooden table, holding a round chocolate chip cookie as if to place it into a red box. Standing next to him is his grandmother, an elderly woman with grey hair tied in a neat bun. She is wearing a green apron over a blue and white patterned long-sleeved dress. She smiles warmly at the boy while holding the side of the red box on the table. Under the table, a small brown terrier-style dog stands on the tiled floor, looking up at the boy and the cookies with curiosity. On the table sits the red box, several loose cookies, a wooden cutting board with a fresh loaf of bread and one cut slice, a decorative teapot, and three different mugs (yellow, green, and white). The kitchen walls are cream-colored, and the backsplash behind the white sink is made of orange and yellow floral tiles. To the left, three long wooden shelves are filled with dozens of glass jars containing preserved fruits, jams, and spices. A large wooden-framed window on the right reveals a bright, sunny afternoon outdoors with lush green trees and a soft blue sky with fluffy white clouds. The floor is covered in beautiful patterned tiles in shades of orange, yellow, and brown. The overall atmosphere is cozy and full of love.
